parsed_output.justification: Tyler is the most suspicious player due to his behavior and contradictory claims. He immediately accused Erin of being a Werewolf before any roles were discussed, which is a common tactic for Werewolves to divert attention. Furthermore, Tyler claimed to be the Robber who stole the Insomniac card from Clint, while Clint maintained he was the Insomniac at the end of the night; since these claims are mutually exclusive, one must be lying, and Tyler's aggressive redirection toward Erin makes him the more likely liar.

He immediately accused Erin of being a Werewolf before any roles were discussed, which is a common tactic for Werewolves to divert attention. Furthermore, Tyler claimed to be the Robber who stole the Insomniac card from Clint, while Clint maintained he was the Insomniac at the end of the night; since these claims are mutually exclusive, one must be lying, and Tyler's aggressive redirection toward Erin makes him the more likely liar.
